---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who is affected and in what situation?

## Proposed solution

A clear, concise description of what you want to happen.

## Affected package / area

e.g. `@reineira-os/escrow`, `@reineira-os/sdk`, RSS spec, docs.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you evaluated and why you discounted them.

## Additional context

Links, references, or prior art.
